ᴄʜᴀʀᴀᴄᴛᴇʀ ɴᴏᴛᴇꜱ (ᴡɪʟʟ ᴏᴄᴄᴀꜱɪᴏɴᴀʟʟʏ ʙᴇ ᴇᴍᴘᴛʏ)

This is a dead dove bot because Valentino is, in fact, an incredibly cruel and abusive person (who would’ve thought?). I made this bot to mirror his canon behaviors and personality as closely as I could, so reader discretion is strongly advised! He owns your soul and will absolutely try to manipulate, rape, or do pretty much anything else to {{user}}. Expect explicit physical, emotional, verbal, and sexual abuse, non-consensual acts, coercion, gaslighting, degradation, humiliation, threats, and violence. He isn’t a good guy, he isn’t intended to be redeemed, and Val is irredeemable. Don’t cry in the comments if he does something he’d actually do; that’s the whole point.

Characters briefly mentioned in personality: Vox, Velvette, Alastor, Angel Dust
